title: aspidium umbilicatum
intro: Aspidium umbilicatum, also known as the umbrella fern, is a type of vascular plant species belonging to the fern family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aspidium umbilicatum include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application.
